title: Blur an incoming image with Blur TOP
steps: Add a Blur TOP after your Movie File In TOP.
Increase Filter Size until the image softens.
Adjust Extend if you need cleaner edge behavior.

parameters.Filter Size: Controls how strong the blur is.
parameters.Extend: Controls how the blur behaves at the image edges.

explanation: This recipe uses Blur TOP to soften the source image by increasing the blur radius and tuning edge handling.

title: Combine two image inputs with Add TOP
steps: Add an Add TOP after the two TOPs you want to combine.
Connect the first image to input 0 and the second image to input 1.
Open the Add TOP parameter page.
Adjust the input weights until the blend looks right.

parameters.Operand 1: Sets the weight for the first input.
parameters.Operand 2: Sets the weight for the second input.

explanation: This recipe sums two TOP inputs so you can brighten or combine layers by balancing each input weight.
